reviews.review_description: Needs work. I hope when it releases it works as described

Hi

Your app crashes on the avatar editor on quest 1. Managed to get it working after many attempts. If you could skip the avatar editor on quest 1 may help just have it default avatar.

Could you have option to select which environment we want without having a specific environment for each app. Some cinema environments be nice.

For YouTube the full screen button not working. Also can you make YouTube have dark mode if possible.


Will update stars when crashing fixed
Will more environments and content be added? Including  U.S. national TV ( abc , NBC, cbs , hbo Change seats , Movie theaters etc?

developer_response.body: Hello Aaronb! Thank you very much for your kind review and score. There will be a lot of exciting features will be added soon. What if, instead of relying on our brilliant team, you could use your own creativity and our artificial intelligence to build the atmosphere you want to watch TV in? Would you like to watch your favorite content next to a waterfall on Mars, accompanied by the sunset of three suns? This and much more will be on TVR very soon! Don't tell anyone. ;)

reviews.review_description: Try regostering and everytime the keyboard goes away. worthless

reviews.review_title: Free TV on the Big Screen with friends
reviews.review_description:
I was invited to play test this app by the developers for free.

The idea of being able to watch IPTV channels in VR is great, it supports multiple screens simultaneously, a huge variety of channels and for the most part works really well

The avatar creation system is brilliant with many of options to play with, you could literally spend hours customising if you wanted to!

There are a couple of niggles to work out but nothing fundamental and it’s currently in the app lab so completely forgivable. It’s a 4 star product at the moment but given it a 5 rating as I’m sure they will address those as they get more feedback.

developer_response.body: Hi Paul! Thank you very much for your review and rating, new update on the way!
